suspicious_activity.narrative: Regina Ramos (ID: CUST_0137) conducted 49 transactions totaling $144,448.68 between the review period. Activity indicates structuring at Medium risk. Transactions lack clear economic purpose, consistent with suspicious activity under the Bank Secrecy Act, 31 CFR 1020.320.
key_indicators: Possible smurfing — deliberate sub-threshold structuring detected
